notes: Ghost Battles config + data model. A 'ghost' is the recorded output of a completed, VERIFIED Fight Mode session. You race against its replay: no live multiplayer, just a saved-numbers playback (like a racing-game ghost lap). Engine: protocol-src/engine/ghost-engine.ts. Designer visuals: share card design 40e (1080x1080); Fight Mode trophies design 40f (512x512).

win_metric.description: How a battle is decided depends on the session type.
win_metric.strikes: Open sessions (Combo Coach, Fight Focus) — more verified strikes wins. No fixed end.
win_metric.time: Stage-based runs (Arcade, Camp) — FASTER completion wins (beat-the-clock, like the existing Arcade target-time model). This is what card 40e shows: 'Stage 3 · 4:12 vs 4:38 · ▲ 26s FASTER · GHOST DEFEATED'.
win_metric.rule: Each ghost stores its win_metric. The share card and outcome copy adapt: time delta ('26s FASTER') for time, strike delta ('+12 STRIKES') for strikes.

ghost_record.description: What every ghost stores. Small — just enough to replay pace and show identity.

shape.win_metric: strikes | time — how this battle is decided (see win_metric section)
shape.buckets: number[] — strikes per 10-second interval across the whole session (drives the live replay counter in BOTH metrics; rest buckets are 0)
shape.best_round: int — highest single-round strike count (strikes tiebreak)
shape.completion_sec: int — total time to finish (required for win_metric 'time')
shape.stage_label: string — e.g. 'Stage 3', shown on the 40e card
shape.streak: int — streak at run time, secondary stat on the 40e card
shape.verified: bool — ONLY sessions that passed the anti-cheat integrity check can become ghosts
shape.created_at: timestamp (stamped by app, not the engine)

ghost_record.rule: Only verified sessions become ghosts. Unverified sessions are never offered as a challenge — this is the 'no fake scores' guarantee and a marketing point.

battle_result.win_rule: Per win_metric: strikes → higher total_strikes wins; time → lower completion_sec (faster) wins.
battle_result.tiebreak: strikes: higher best_round; time: more strikes; still tied → draw.
battle_result.xp: Victory grants bonus XP; a loss still grants the normal session XP (never punish showing up).

share_card_40e.layout: gold/violet diagonal split with a lightning seam. Header 'GHOST BATTLE' + subtitle ('you vs your last camp run'). Two avatar frames: TODAY (gold, full color) vs GHOST · LAST RUN (violet, ghosted/faded), 'VS' between them. Per-side stat line: '{stage_label} · {time} · {streak} streak'. Green headline strip ('▲ 26s FASTER · GHOST DEFEATED') from battleHeadline(). Hex socket = VERIFIED badge. Avatars composited in-app. Export 1080x1080.
share_card_40e.engine: Headline via battleHeadline(result); avatars/stats from the two ghost records.

fight_trophies_40f.note: These are the four Fight Mode trophies specced earlier (05b Prompt 5) — now designed. Wire to their real trigger events.

always_available: MY_BEST — the user's own best verified ghost for the chosen mode/discipline
sources: RECENT_GHOSTS — ghosts the user downloaded via challenge code/link
CHALLENGE_CODE — a shared code/link a friend sent
SUGGESTED — a ghost near the user's level (see selection)
matchmaking.selection_for_suggested: Prefer a ghost whose total_strikes is within ~15% of the user's own best for that mode — a beatable-but-challenging race. Fall back to MY_BEST if none.
matchmaking.format_rule: A ghost battle inherits the ghost's rounds_config — you fight its format so the comparison is fair. Show it read-only on setup.

mode_wiring.description: Which modes offer ghost battles and how each is decided. See specs/24-ghost-battles-wiring.md. v1 scope = Fight-Mode-first (combo_coach, fight_focus, camp); fit-only arcade ghosts are deferred and safety-gated.

combo_coach.note: Primary home. Open striking session, most strikes wins.

fight_focus.note: Native strikes race, same as Combo Coach.

camp.note: Stage TIME race (beat-the-clock); a single round may race on strikes.

arcade_fight.note: Fight/both arcade stages wire exactly like camp.

arcade_fit_only.note: No strikes to replay — pure time/pace race. Extra weight; ship after the fight-first version. Per-campaign OPT-IN and safety-gated.

fit_only_safety_gate.rule: A ghost TIME race must never turn a safety-capped stage into a 'beat the clock' incentive that undermines its caps.
fit_only_safety_gate.opt_out_reason: Gravity is controlled tempo/hold work and Sonic's max-velocity sprints require full recovery — racing on time would push users to violate the built-in caps. These campaigns opt OUT of fit-only ghosts; prefer 'completed it' over 'how fast'.

combo_coach_icon.where: A small ghost icon (👻) on the Combo Coach setup screen, present from the start (per user request; visuals per designer).
combo_coach_icon.tap: Opens the ghost opponent picker (MY BEST / recent / enter code) → starts a ghost battle using Combo Coach as the session.
combo_coach_icon.empty_state: If the user has no ghost yet, the icon still shows and explains: 'Finish a session to create your first ghost, then race it.'

vs_popup.where: An occasional VS-mode pop-up (framed like a fighting-game 'VS' screen).
vs_popup.when: Fires at most once every ~2-3 days, and ONLY when there is something real to react to: a newly downloaded friend ghost, or 'someone beat your challenge' (a friend's session beat a ghost you set).

cadence_rules.dismissible: Always dismissible; dismissing does not re-prompt the same event.

vs_popup.content: Both avatars faced off, the challenge (e.g. 'RYAN threw 214 — beat it') and a gold 'ACCEPT · VS' CTA that starts the matching session; a 'later' option.

set_as_challenge.where: On every VERIFIED Fight Mode Mission Complete / outcome screen.
set_as_challenge.action: Generates a short challenge code / share link; the recipient enters it to download the ghost and race it. Only verified sessions can be set as a challenge.

privacy.opt_in: Sharing a ghost is user-initiated (SET AS CHALLENGE) — sessions are never auto-published.
privacy.data_shared: Only the ghost_record fields above (pace buckets + display identity). No location, no health data.
privacy.friend_ghosts_are_read_only: Downloaded ghosts replay locally; they are recordings, not live connections.
